sentences.arabic: يَعْتَمِدُ النَّجَاحُ فِي الشَّرِكَةِ عَلَى الْعَمَلِ الْجَمَاعِيِّ الْمُنَظَّمِ.
sentences.translation: Uspjeh u kompaniji zavisi od organizovanog timskog rada.
sentences.translationEn: Success in the company depends on organized teamwork.

sentences.arabic: يَجْتَمِعُ الْمُوَظَّفُونَ كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ لِمُنَاقَشَةِ الْأَفْكَارِ الْجَدِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zaposlenici se sastaju svake sedmice kako bi razgovarali o novim idejama.
sentences.translationEn: The employees meet every week to discuss new ideas.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ كُلُّ فَرْدٍ زَمِيلَهُ لِتَحْقِيقِ الْأَهْدَافِ الْمُشْتَرَكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki pojedinac pomaže svom kolegi da ostvare zajedničke ciljeve.
sentences.translationEn: Each individual helps their colleague to achieve common goals.
